title: Handmade Leather Journal
summary: Vintage workshop close-up of a saddle-leather journal with brass pen and steaming tea.
prompt: A close-up product photograph of a handcrafted leather journal: rich cognac-brown saddle leather with subtle hand-stitched edges and a single brass-tipped leather strap closure. Lying on an aged wooden desk with a vintage brass fountain pen, a few dried autumn oak leaves, and a small enamel mug of dark tea steaming gently. Warm low-angle window light, deep ambient shadows. Vintage workshop atmosphere, hyper-detailed leather grain, square composition.
